entries.formal_governance: Emperor with delegated great-house roles and guild pressure replacing or degrading older monopolies.
faith_to_institution_links: Knowledge legitimizes archives, records, and credential scrutiny.
Contemplation legitimizes legal reasoning, educational prestige, and slow procedure.
Compassion legitimizes harmony language and selective mercy theatre.
Fear legitimizes prophecy markets, vigilance codes, and overreaction to symbolic disorder.
Renewal legitimizes repair rhetoric, restoration festivals, and second-chance narratives when politically useful.
entries.law_vs_practice: Law claims ordered hierarchy; practice bends toward whoever controls roads, paper trails, and witness access.
economic_dependency: book and magical accreditation from Mimolot
trade throughput increasingly mediated by Union networks

entries.formal_governance: Privately held civic nodes stabilized through dome stewardship and magical containment institutions.
faith_to_institution_links: Creation legitimizes experimentation and urban beauty projects.
Joy legitimizes euphoric civic festivals and emotional spectacle.
Renewal legitimizes repair, healing, reintegration attempts, and the language of cleansing.
Curiosity legitimizes risky research even when public rhetoric claims restraint.
entries.law_vs_practice: Law frames exile and containment as communal safety; practice can blur into beauty-based exclusion and fear-driven quiet coercion.
public_myths: mutations happen only to the careless

entries.formal_governance: Guild-led tower civilization under giant kingship and caste-coded civic function.
faith_to_institution_links: Contemplation legitimizes planning and structural order.
Fear legitimizes hard preparedness and grim forecasting.
Knowledge legitimizes records, metrics, and production memory.
Ambition legitimizes vertical expansion and achievement hierarchy.
Compassion survives mainly as mutual burden-sharing rhetoric inside labor systems.
entries.law_vs_practice: Duty is treated as fairness even when burden distribution is unequal.
instability_points: industrial accidents framed as noble sacrifice

entries.formal_governance: Matriarchal household sovereignty under queenly adjudication with wartime transfer to the queen's husband under martial necessity.
faith_to_institution_links: Domination shapes valor and test-based worth.
Contemplation survives in tactical planning and oath seriousness rather than quiet scholarship.
Destruction and Agony haunt war custom, sacrifice, and hardness myths.
Desperation shapes vow intensity during crisis and return-pledge culture.
entries.law_vs_practice: Domestic sovereignty is absolute in rhetoric and usually in practice, except under severe wartime override.

entries.formal_governance: Consensus elder council governing a mobile trade nation through portable legitimacy and market coordination.
dominant_faith_pressure: mixed and negotiated; practical syncretism with strong Trickery, Knowledge, and Renewal exposure
faith_to_institution_links: Knowledge shapes recordkeeping and deal memory.
Renewal shapes conflict repair after trade disputes.
Trickery tolerance produces flexible identity surfaces and rumor-savvy diplomacy.
entries.law_vs_practice: Consensus appears soft but becomes ruthless when staple denial or purchase strikes are authorized.
public_myths: Nomdara is harmless if treated politely
